hero.name: Vikas Kumar
hero.metaLine: PhD Student, EECS, IISER Bhopal | SIRL Lab
paragraphsHtml: I am currently pursuing my PhD at IISER Bhopal in the EECS Department. My research focuses on intelligent systems and practical engineering for real-world deployment, and I work with the SIRL Lab.
paragraphs: I am currently pursuing my PhD at IISER Bhopal in the EECS Department.
My research focuses on intelligent systems and practical engineering for real-world deployment.
I work with the SIRL Lab and enjoy building applied AI systems.

highlights.text: Poster presentation at EECS Symposium 2026 at IISER Bhopal.
